channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Aging-Anxiety Could Actually Be Making You Age Faster, Study Finds
item.description: Making peace with aging could be one of the best things you do for your health

item.title: 5 Ways To Address Crepey Skin On Your Neck, Backed By Science & A Derm
item.description: Here's a skin care fact for you: The skin on your neck and chest is some of the most delicate, sensitive, and thinnest of the entire body.

item.title: Eating This Way Could Lower Risk Of Gastric Cancer By Almost 30%, Study Finds
item.description: Yet another reason to adopt the diet.

item.title: The One Neurologist-Approved Workout That's A+ For Better Brain Health
item.description: If these neurologists had to pick a favorite, it would be this.

item.title: Families Defend Disability Services Amid Medicaid Cuts
item.description: Idaho is positioning to slash Medicaid funding as state lawmakers grapple with the effects of the federal One Big Beautiful Bill Act, which President ...

item.title: The Science-Backed Sleep Rituals That Support Skin Longevity
item.description: That’s why it’s incredibly important to cultivate an evening ritual that supports long-term skin health. Below, a science-backed guide to exactly that...

item.title: Medicaid Is Paying for More Dental Care. GOP Cuts Threaten To Reverse the Trend.
item.description: More than three dozen states cover dental services for low-income and disabled individuals on Medicaid, in recognition of such care’s importance to ov...

item.title: ICE, ALS, Addiction Medicine, and Robotic Ultrasounds: Journalists Sound Off on All That and More
item.description: KFF Health News journalists made the rounds on national and local media recently to discuss topical stories. Here’s a collection of their appearances.

item.title: To Avoid Care Disruptions, Know When the Clock Runs Out on Your Prior Authorization
item.description: A Massachusetts woman knew the medicine her doctor prescribed required preauthorization, but she didn’t realize the approval had an expiration date. I...

item.title: A Canadian Hospital Scoops Up Nurses Who No Longer Feel Safe in Trump’s America
item.description: Get our weekly newsletter, The Week in Brief, featuring a roundup of our original coverage, Fridays at 2 p.m. ET.

item.title: Lupito Nyong’o’s Fibroids Have Returned, She Now Has 50
item.description: Last summer, Academy Award-winning actress Lupita Nyong’o revealed that she had 30 fibroids removed via myomectomy not long after winning her Oscar in...

item.title: Human Braiding Hair May Be a Health Hazard Too
